_secrets: ConnectionStrings:DefaultConnection and Jwt:SecretKey are intentionally blank. Supply them via appsettings.Development.json (git-ignored) for local dev, or environment variables (ConnectionStrings__DefaultConnection, Jwt__SecretKey, Turnstile__SecretKey) in production.

Storage._comment: Relative paths resolve against the app content root; absolute paths are used as-is.

Turnstile._comment: Cloudflare Turnstile. Leave SecretKey empty to disable verification (dev). Production: set Turnstile__SecretKey.

Audit._comment: AuditLog rows older than RetentionDays are deleted daily by AuditLogPurger. Set to 0 to disable purging.
